Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Admissions
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JO-ANNA NIEVES, APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. LISA J. ESPADA, TEL. NO. 504-6195 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT LEE REYMORE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Admissions IS GRANTED. SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $750.00 IS GRANTED PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL BY SEPTEMBER 27, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem : Robert Kane; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Admissions
Off Calendar Aug-23-2013 Continued To Aug-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling: Defendant LEE REYMORE'S Motion to Compel Further Responses to Special Interrogatories and Request for Admissions is continued to August 30, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 23, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge Pro Tem: Bradley P. Kaplan; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
